description: A simple vertical quote card from USCIS on a dark navy textured background with faint oversized quotation-mark graphics behind the text. The body is a white sans-serif pull-quote with selected phrases bolded for emphasis: 'For years, states have pleaded for tools to help identify and stop aliens from hijacking our elections. Under the leadership of President Trump and Secretary Noem, USCIS is moving quickly to eliminate voter fraud. We expect further improvements soon and remain committed to restoring trust in American elections.' Below, in a small light grey box, the attribution reads 'Matthew Tragesser,' (bold) over 'Chief of Public Affairs at USCIS' (italic). There is no photograph — it is a clean text-only statement graphic. The messaging technique is an authoritative official-quote format amplifying the administration's claim that non-citizens commit voter fraud and that the SAVE program will stop it. The loaded language ('aliens hijacking our elections,' 'restoring trust') is designed to reinforce the voter-fraud narrative. Target audience is the general public and conservative media, framing the administration as protecting election integrity.
notable_text: '...stop aliens from hijacking our elections... USCIS is moving quickly to eliminate voter fraud... committed to restoring trust in American elections.' - Matthew Tragesser, Chief of Public Affairs at USCIS
